rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification clearly shows the year '1831' at the top of the page. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted '1834' despite its confident note regarding clarity.

Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Soluta Varia' is a distinct header row. It lacks an associated amount on its line and precedes the first financial entry. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this header with the subsequent entry ('Boo: Rever') and misclassified it as part of an entry's description.

Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Boos. Rever' (visually 'Boo: Rever') accurately captures the text associated with the amount. Visual verification confirms the amount '2752.9.½'. The '½' fraction symbol is clear in the pence column, but no whole pence digit is present, implying 0 pence as noted by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '7' pence and merged this row's description with the preceding 'Soluta Varia' header.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Unclear — possible transcription error, amounting to £2752 9s 0½d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the exact description, including the period. Both extractors correctly identified this as a header row without amounts. This row was resolved by consensus on its semantic classification and values (empty amounts).

rows.description: Remainder of the contract for restoring the front of the College (Comp. 1833. 1500) 3.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Both extractors correctly identified the amount '1000.0.0'. gemini-flash's description is more accurate, capturing the '3.' at the end of the line which is visually part of the description text, not a monetary value. gpt-5-mini omitted this '3.' and included a hyphen instead.
rows.english_description: Final payment under Mr Plowman's contract for restoring the front of the College.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Final payment under Mr Plowman's contract for restoring the front of the College, amounting to £1000 0s 0d.

rows.description: Extra Bill for the interior face of the Tower & pavement under the same.
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash for the exact description, including the period. Both extractors accurately identified the amount '346.3.7'. gpt-5-mini's note regarding the 'slight flourish' on the final pence digit was a good observation, but the reading is clear upon visual verification. This row was resolved by consensus on its monetary values and type.
rows.english_description: Additional bill to Mr Plowman for work on the interior face of the College Tower and the paving beneath it.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional bill to Mr Plowman for work on the interior face of the College Tower and the paving beneath it, amounting to £346 3s 7d.

rows.description: Allowed for land carriage of Stone, & supplies to the workmen 3-
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Both extractors agreed on the amount '34.1.0'. gemini-flash's description is more accurate, correctly reading 'supplies' (gpt-5-mini read 'hoppers') and including the '3-' at the end of the line which is visible in the image.
rows.english_description: Payment for cartage of stone from the land and for supplies provided to the workmen in connection with the contract.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for cartage of stone from the land and for supplies provided to the workmen, amounting to £34 1s 0d.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. This subtotal row ('380.4') is clearly visible in the image, indicated by a brace connecting the two preceding entries. gpt-5-mini entirely missed this row. gemini-flash correctly extracted the amount and its notes accurately highlight the visual context and the arithmetic discrepancy (sum of 3s 7d + 1s 0d = 4s 7d, but the subtotal states 4s 0d), which implies the 7d was dropped or rounded.

Selected the monetary values from both extractors, as they agreed perfectly and are visually confirmed from the image. The row is semantically classified as 'TOTAL' due to the double underline, although no explicit 'TOTAL' text is present. gpt-5-mini provided an excellent note on the potential ambiguity of the leading '4' (resembling an 'A') and performed a valuable arithmetic check, confirming the sum of all entries. gemini-flash correctly noted the double underline.
